title: Hippagrostis
taxonomy: Hippagrostis is classified as a genus of plants, specifically within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. The Poaceae family is further classified under the monocotyledons, a group of flowering plants that have one seed leaf. Within the Poaceae family, Hippagrostis is often placed in the subfamily Chloridoideae, which is a group of grasses known for their small seeds and often annual or perennial growth habits. The classification of Hippagrostis is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the Poaceae family. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Hippagrostis within the Poaceae family.
